title: The Rise of Agentic AI: When Models Learn to Act
subtitle: From prediction to action in modern AI systems.
description: A research-focused essay on Agentic AI, from ReAct loops to safety, including implications for seismology and scientific workflows.
excerpt: We've spent years teaching machines to predict the next token. Now we're teaching them to take the next step. Agentic AI is not just a capability upgrade — it's a philosophical shift.
hero_caption: An abstract representation of branching decisions in an agentic system.
hero_aria: Abstract visualization of AI decision trees
